series_metadata.series_title: Credit Union Guaranty Corporation Department of Insurance - Other Correspondence
series_metadata.series_description: These records contain correspondence between the Division of Financial Institutions and the Department of Insurance regarding credit union guaranty corporations.

retention_rules.disposition: Paper: Retain paper copy in operating area until imaged and indexed. Upon confirmation that paper copy has been checked for quality and completeness, destroy. ; Electronic: Retain electronic files until next examination, then destroy., Paper: Shred ; Electronic: Erase
